name: PromptLayer (LLM Prompt Logging and Management)

performance.notes: Adds ~50ms overhead per request for logging

agent_readiness.notes: LLM prompt logging and management platform. import promptlayer; promptlayer.api_key = 'pl_...'. from promptlayer import openai (drop-in for openai). openai.chat.completions.create(...) → logged automatically. Templates: promptlayer.templates.get('my-template', {'var': 'value'}). Track requests: return_pl_id=True. Tags: pl_tags=['production', 'v2']. Request history and analytics in dashboard. LangChain integration: PromptLayerCallbackHandler. A/B testing prompts via dashboard. Version control for prompts. Scores/feedback API: promptlayer.track.score(request_id, score=1). Metadata tracking. REST API for fetching logged requests. Multi-provider: OpenAI, Anthropic, Cohere.

gotchas: All prompts/responses sent to PromptLayer servers — consider data privacy
Free tier limits can be hit quickly in production
Smaller feature set vs LangSmith for complex chain tracing
best_when: Simple prompt logging and version control for OpenAI/Anthropic calls
When LangSmith is overkill for non-LangChain use
Teams wanting a quick prompt observability setup
avoid_when: Privacy-sensitive data — prompts sent to PromptLayer servers
summary: PromptLayer logs and manages LLM prompts. Drop-in for openai: from promptlayer import openai. Auto-logs all requests to dashboard. Templates: promptlayer.templates.get('name', vars). Tags, scores, metadata. A/B testing. LangChain integration. Freemium — free 5K/month. Privacy concern: prompts sent to PromptLayer. Adds ~50ms latency. Best for simple prompt logging/versioning without LangChain. LangSmith for complex agent tracing.
